name: build-check
description: Run build/vet/test for Go, TypeScript, Python, or Node.js in one step with timeout, test filtering, fail-only mode (show only failures), output limiting, quiet mode, ANSI stripping, or run Go/Node/TS code from stdin via --go-run/--node-run/--tsx-run, or run mocha/jest/vitest tests, with --cd to change directory before running, or --trim-stack to strip stack traces from output, or --trim-pytest to filter pytest output to summary/failures only.

parameters.name: --cd=DIR, -C DIR
parameters.description: Change to directory before running (replaces cd + command pattern)

parameters.name: --go-run
parameters.description: Write Go code from stdin to temp file and run with go run

parameters.name: --node-run
parameters.description: Write Node.js code from stdin to temp file and run with node

parameters.name: --tsx-run
parameters.description: Write TypeScript code from stdin to temp file and run with npx tsx

parameters.name: --gofmt
parameters.description: Check Go file formatting via gofmt -e

parameters.name: --filter=PATTERN
parameters.description: Test name filter (-run for Go, -t/-k for others)

parameters.name: --head=N
parameters.description: Show first N lines of output

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Show last N lines of output

parameters.name: --quiet, --silent
parameters.description: Suppress stdout on success (exit 0); always show stderr

parameters.name: --trim-ansi
parameters.description: Strip ANSI escape codes from output to reduce observation size

parameters.name: --force-exit
parameters.description: Add --forceExit flag to jest or mocha commands

parameters.name: --fail-only
parameters.description: Show only failed tests and error messages, filter out passing tests

parameters.name: --list-only, --go-list
parameters.description: Run go list -e on the target to verify package resolution and imports

parameters.name: --trim-stack
parameters.description: Strip stack trace lines from output, keeping only error messages and code lines

parameters.name: --trim-pytest
parameters.description: Strip pytest noise (durations, snapshot reports, docs links); keep only summary line(s) and failure info

examples.expected: Compiles and runs Go code from stdin
Compiles and runs TypeScript code from stdin via npx tsx

cost_saving_rationale: Combines Go/Node/TS code write+run into one step instead of write-file + npx tsx two-step; --quiet and --trim-ansi suppress observation-blowing output; --fail-only filters out passing tests to dramatically reduce observation size; unifies build/vet/test with a single entrypoint; --cd replaces cd + command two-step pattern; --trim-stack reduces observation size by removing stack trace boilerplate.
